name: Battle Ropes
instructions:
1. Hold one rope end in each hand.
2. Alternate arms up and down in a wave pattern.
3. Maintain low, athletic stance.
4. Keep core engaged throughout.

name: Bear Crawl
instructions:
1. Start on hands and knees, knees hovering 2 inches off floor.
2. Move opposite hand and foot forward simultaneously.
3. Keep hips low, back flat.
4. Crawl for set distance.

name: Burpee
instructions:
1. Stand, then drop hands to floor.
2. Jump or step feet back to plank.
3. Lower chest to floor.
4. Push up, jump feet forward.
5. Jump up with arms overhead.

name: Butt Kicks
instructions:
1. Run in place, kicking heels up toward glutes.
2. Keep knees pointing straight down.
3. Pump arms naturally.
4. Maintain consistent tempo.

name: Cycling (Stationary)
instructions:
1. Adjust seat so leg is nearly extended at bottom of stroke.
2. Maintain a cadence of 60–90 RPM.
3. Alternate between easy and hard intervals as programmed.

name: Elliptical
instructions:
1. Stand on pedals with slight forward lean.
2. Push and pull handles in opposition to legs.
3. Maintain consistent resistance for steady state or increase for intervals.

name: High knees
instructions:
1. Run in place, driving knees up to hip height.
2. Pump arms in opposition.
3. Land on balls of feet.
4. Maintain quick pace.

name: High-Intensity Interval Run
instructions:
1. Warm up 5 min at easy pace.
2. Sprint at 80–90% effort for 20–30 seconds.
3. Walk or jog 60–90 seconds to recover.
4. Repeat 6–10 rounds; cool down 5 min.

name: Jump Rope
instructions:
1. Hold handles, elbows near ribs.
2. Use wrists to rotate rope.
3. Jump just enough to clear rope.
4. Land softly on balls of feet.

name: Lateral Shuffle
instructions:
1. Start in athletic stance, knees bent.
2. Shuffle laterally by stepping one foot out, then bringing other foot to meet it.
3. Stay low; maintain quick footwork.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
instructions:
1. Stand with feet shoulder-width, hold ball overhead.
2. Slam ball to floor as hard as possible.
3. Squat to pick it up.
4. Repeat at high intensity.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions:
1. Drive with legs first, then lean back, then pull handle to lower ribs.
2. Return in reverse: arms out, lean forward, bend knees.
3. Maintain 18–24 strokes per minute for steady state.

name: Running (Easy Pace)
instructions:
1. Start at a comfortable, conversational pace.
2. Land mid-foot, arms swinging loosely.
3. Maintain easy breathing throughout.
4. Warm up for 5 min, run for the set duration.

name: Speed Skaters
instructions:
1. Start in athletic stance.
2. Leap laterally onto one foot, swinging arms across body.
3. Land softly and leap to opposite side.
4. Mimic a speed skater's stride.

name: Squat Jump
instructions:
1. Descend into a squat.
2. At the bottom, explode upward into a jump.
3. Land softly with bent knees and immediately lower into the next squat.

name: Stair Climbing
instructions:
1. Walk or run up stairs at a steady pace.
2. Drive through the heel of each step.
3. Use arms for momentum on harder efforts.

name: Swimming Laps
instructions:
1. Push off wall; use freestyle, breaststroke or backstroke.
2. Breathe rhythmically every 2–3 strokes.
3. Focus on long, efficient pulls.

name: Tuck Jump
instructions:
1. Stand with feet hip-width.
2. Dip and jump explosively.
3. Pull knees to chest at peak of jump.
4. Land softly and repeat.

name: Walking
instructions:
1. Walk at a brisk, purposeful pace.
2. Swing arms naturally.
3. Keep core lightly engaged.
4. Aim for 100+ steps per minute for a brisk walk.

name: Behind the Back Cable Lateral Raise
Bent over row to external rotation
Cable Front Raise with a small bar
Calf Press Using Leg Press Machine
Calf Raise using Hack Squat Machine
Child's pose
instructions:
1. Kneel, then fold torso over thighs.
2. Extend arms forward or rest at sides.
3. Forehead to mat.
4. Breathe deeply; hold as long as comfortable.

name: Curl de biceps con agarre prono
Facepull
instructions:
1. Set cable at head height with rope attachment.
2. Pull rope toward face, elbows flaring out.
3. Externally rotate and squeeze rear delts at end.
4. Return slowly.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions:
1. Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
2. Drive hips toward ceiling, squeezing glutes.
3. Hold for 2 seconds at top.
4. Lower slowly.

name: Good Morning
instructions:
1. Stand with bar on upper back, feet hip-width.
2. Hinge at hips, keeping back flat.
3. Lower torso until nearly parallel to floor.
4. Return to standing by extending hips.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions:
1. Hold dumbbells with neutral grip (palms facing each other).
2. Curl dumbbells toward shoulders without rotating wrists.
3. Lower slowly.

name: Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions:
1. Kneel with one knee on floor, other foot forward.
2. Push hips forward gently.
3. Keep torso upright.
4. Hold 20–30 seconds each side.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions:
1. Upper back against a bench, bar across hips.
2. Drive hips upward by squeezing glutes.
3. Pause at the top for one second.
4. Lower slowly.

name: Incline Close Grip Barbell Bench Press
Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions:
1. Set bench to 30–45 degree incline.
2. Hold dumbbells at chest level.
3. Press up and slightly inward.
4. Lower to chest level.

name: Incline Plank With Alternate Floor Touch
Jumping Jacks
instructions:
1. Stand with feet together, arms at sides.
2. Jump to spread feet wide while raising arms overhead.
3. Jump back to start.
4. Maintain rhythm.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions:
1. Stand with feet slightly wider than hip-width.
2. Hinge back, swing kettlebell between legs.
3. Drive hips forward explosively to swing it to chest height.
4. Let it swing back between legs and repeat.

name: Lat Pull Down
instructions:
1. Sit at cable machine, overhand grip wider than shoulders.
2. Pull bar to upper chest, driving elbows down.
3. Return slowly to full arm extension.

name: Lat Pulldown - Cross Body Single Arm
Lateral Rows on Cable, One Armed
Leg Curl
instructions:
1. Lie face down on machine, ankles under pad.
2. Curl legs toward glutes.
3. Lower slowly.

name: Leg Extension
instructions:
1. Sit on machine, ankles under pad.
2. Extend legs fully, pause, then lower slowly.

name: Leg Press
instructions:
1. Sit in machine, feet shoulder-width on platform.
2. Lower platform until knees are at 90 degrees.
3. Press back to start without locking knees.

name: No Leg Drive Dumbbell Chest Press
One Arm Overhead Cable Tricep Extension
One Arm Triceps Extensions on Cable
Overhead Press
instructions:
1. Stand with bar at shoulder height, grip just outside shoulders.
2. Press bar overhead to full lockout.
3. Lower bar back to shoulders under control.
4. Keep core tight; avoid excessive back arch.

name: Prone Scapular Retraction - Arms at Side
Push-Up
instructions:
1. Start in high plank: hands under shoulders, body straight.
2. Lower chest toward floor, elbows at 45 degrees.
3. Push through palms back to start.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions:
1. Stand with bar at hips, slight knee bend.
2. Hinge hips back, keeping bar close to legs.
3. Lower until a deep hamstring stretch is felt.
4. Drive hips forward to return.

name: Russian Twist
instructions:
1. Sit with knees bent, feet off floor, torso reclined.
2. Hold weight and rotate torso side to side.
3. Tap weight to floor at each side.

name: Shoulder Raise Side and Front DB
Side Plank
instructions:
1. Lie on one side, forearm on floor.
2. Stack feet, raise hips off floor in a straight line.
3. Hold position, switch sides.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions:
1. Wide stance, toes pointed out, grip inside legs.
2. Keep chest tall, back flat.
3. Drive hips forward to stand.

name: Triceps Extensions on Cable With Bar
unilateral cross body cable pull down
Calf Stretch Against Wall
instructions:
1. Place palms on wall, one foot back.
2. Keep rear heel on floor and press hip forward.
3. Feel calf stretch.
4. Hold 20–30 seconds each side.

name: Cat-Cow Mobility
instructions:
1. On hands and knees, alternate between arching and rounding spine.
2. Inhale on arch, exhale on round.
3. 10 slow repetitions.

name: Chest Opener Stretch
instructions:
1. Clasp hands behind back.
2. Squeeze shoulder blades together and lift chest.
3. Hold 20–30 seconds.

name: Child's Pose Stretch
instructions:
1. Kneel and sit back on heels.
2. Fold torso forward, arms extended.
3. Forehead rests on floor.
4. Hold 30–60 seconds while breathing.

name: Doorway Chest Stretch
instructions:
1. Stand in a doorway, arms at 90 degrees.
2. Step one foot forward.
3. Lean into doorway until chest stretches.
4. Hold 20–30 seconds.

name: Figure-4 Piriformis Stretch
instructions:
1. Lie on back, cross one ankle over opposite knee.
2. Pull uncrossed leg toward chest.
3. Feel stretch in crossed-leg glute.
4. Hold 30 seconds each side.

name: IT Band Stretch
instructions:
1. Stand and cross one foot behind the other.
2. Lean sideways in the direction of the back foot.
3. Extend arm overhead for a deeper stretch.
4. Hold 20–30 seconds each side.

name: Lying Knee-to-Chest
instructions:
1. Lie on back.
2. Pull both knees toward chest with arms.
3. Rock gently side to side.
4. Hold 30 seconds.

name: Neck Rotation Stretch
instructions:
1. Sit tall and slowly turn head to one side.
2. Hold when resistance is felt.
3. Return to center and repeat other side.
4. 15–20 seconds each side.

name: Neck Side Stretch
instructions:
1. Sit or stand upright.
2. Tilt ear toward shoulder.
3. Optionally press hand gently on head.
4. Hold 15–20 seconds each side.

name: Seated Butterfly Stretch
instructions:
1. Sit with soles of feet together.
2. Hold ankles and gently press knees toward floor.
3. Hinge forward from hips for deeper stretch.
4. Hold 30 seconds.

name: Seated Spinal Twist
instructions:
1. Sit in a chair with feet flat.
2. Rotate torso to one side, placing hands on chair back.
3. Hold 15–20 seconds; repeat other side.

name: Shoulder Cross-Body Stretch
instructions:
1. Bring one arm across chest.
2. Use opposite hand to pull arm closer.
3. Hold 20–30 seconds each arm.

name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
instructions:
1. Stand and place one heel on a step or low surface.
2. Keep leg straight and hinge forward from hips.
3. Feel the stretch in the back of the thigh.
4. Hold 20–30 seconds each side.

name: Standing Quad Stretch
instructions:
1. Stand on one foot.
2. Bend opposite knee, pulling foot toward glutes.
3. Keep knees together.
4. Hold 20–30 seconds each side.

name: Standing Side Stretch
instructions:
1. Stand with feet hip-width apart.
2. Raise one arm overhead and lean to the opposite side.
3. Hold 15–20 seconds each side.

name: Thoracic Rotation Stretch
instructions:
1. Sit cross-legged or on a chair.
2. Place one hand behind head, elbow out.
3. Rotate shoulder open toward ceiling.
4. 10 reps each side.

name: Tricep Overhead Stretch
instructions:
1. Raise one arm, bend elbow behind head.
2. Use opposite hand to gently push elbow.
3. Hold 20–30 seconds each side.

name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
instructions:
1. Extend one arm forward, palm up.
2. Use opposite hand to gently pull fingers back.
3. Hold 15–20 seconds each side.

name: Boat Pose
instructions:
1. Sit with knees bent, feet off floor.
2. Balance on sit bones.
3. Extend legs to 45 degrees, arms forward.
4. Hold for 5 breaths.

name: Bridge Pose
instructions:
1. Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
2. Press feet down, lift hips.
3. Interlace fingers under back.
4. Hold 5 breaths.

name: Camel Pose
instructions:
1. Kneel with hips over knees.
2. Place hands on lower back, fingers pointing down.
3. Gently arch back, reaching for heels.
4. Hold 3–5 breaths; come up slowly.

name: Cat-Cow Stretch
instructions:
1. Start on hands and knees.
2. Inhale: drop belly, lift head and tailbone (Cow).
3. Exhale: round spine toward ceiling, tuck chin (Cat).
4. Flow between for 10 breaths.

name: Chair Pose
instructions:
1. Stand with feet together.
2. Bend knees as if sitting back into a chair.
3. Raise arms overhead.
4. Hold 5 breaths.

name: Cobra Pose
instructions:
1. Lie face down, hands under shoulders.
2. Inhale and press chest off floor.
3. Keep pelvis on mat.
4. Hold 3–5 breaths.

name: Corpse Pose
instructions:
1. Lie flat on back, legs slightly apart.
2. Arms at sides, palms up.
3. Close eyes, relax every muscle.
4. Hold 5–10 minutes.

name: Crow Pose
instructions:
1. Squat and place palms on floor.
2. Place knees on back of upper arms.
3. Lean forward, shift weight into hands.
4. Lift feet off floor and hold.

name: Downward-Facing Dog
instructions:
1. Start on hands and knees.
2. Tuck toes, lift hips up and back.
3. Straighten legs as much as possible.
4. Press palms into floor, lengthen spine.
5. Hold 5 breaths.

name: Eagle Pose
instructions:
1. Stand, cross one thigh over other, hook foot if possible.
2. Cross elbows at 90 degrees, forearms intertwined.
3. Bend standing knee and hold 5 breaths.

name: Garland Pose
instructions:
1. Stand with feet wider than hips, toes out.
2. Lower into a deep squat.
3. Press elbows against inner knees.
4. Hands at heart center. Hold 5 breaths.

name: Half Moon Pose
instructions:
1. From Warrior II, reach forward hand to floor or block.
2. Lift rear leg to hip height.
3. Extend top arm toward ceiling.
4. Hold 3–5 breaths.

name: Happy Baby Pose
instructions:
1. Lie on back, draw knees toward chest.
2. Grab outer edges of feet.
3. Flex feet, stack ankles over knees.
4. Gently rock side to side. Hold 5 breaths.

name: Legs Up the Wall
instructions:
1. Sit sideways next to a wall.
2. Swing legs up the wall as you lie back.
3. Arms resting at sides, palms up.
4. Hold 5–10 minutes breathing deeply.

name: Locust Pose
instructions:
1. Lie face down, arms at sides.
2. Inhale and lift chest, arms and legs simultaneously.
3. Engage back muscles throughout.
4. Hold 3–5 breaths.

name: Pigeon Pose
instructions:
1. From Downward Dog, bring one shin forward parallel to mat.
2. Extend rear leg behind.
3. Fold torso over front shin.
4. Hold 5–10 breaths each side.

name: Seated Forward Fold
instructions:
1. Sit with legs extended.
2. Inhale to lengthen spine.
3. Exhale and hinge forward from hips.
4. Hold feet, shins, or use a strap.
5. Hold 5–10 breaths.

name: Seated Twist
instructions:
1. Sit with legs extended.
2. Cross one foot over opposite knee.
3. Twist toward bent knee, placing elbow outside it.
4. Hold 5 breaths each side.

name: Sun Salutation A
instructions:
1. Begin in Mountain Pose, hands at heart.
2. Inhale: raise arms overhead.
3. Exhale: fold forward.
4. Inhale: half-lift.
5. Exhale: step or jump to plank, lower to floor.
6. Inhale: Upward Dog.
7. Exhale: Downward Dog for 5 breaths.
8. Walk to front, half-lift, fold, return to Mountain.

name: Tree Pose
instructions:
1. Stand on one foot.
2. Place the sole of the other foot on the inner calf or thigh.
3. Hands at heart or raised overhead.
4. Focus gaze on a fixed point. Hold 5–10 breaths.

name: Triangle Pose
instructions:
1. Stand with wide stance.
2. Front foot faces forward, rear foot 90 degrees.
3. Extend front arm toward front foot, reaching shin, ankle or floor.
4. Extend other arm toward ceiling.
5. Hold 5 breaths each side.

name: Warrior I
instructions:
1. Step one foot back into a lunge.
2. Turn rear foot out 45 degrees.
3. Square hips forward, raise arms overhead.
4. Bend front knee to 90 degrees, hold 5 breaths.

name: Warrior II
instructions:
1. Step feet wide apart.
2. Turn front foot out 90 degrees, rear foot in slightly.
3. Bend front knee, extend arms parallel to floor.
4. Gaze over front hand. Hold 5 breaths.

name: Warrior III
instructions:
1. From standing, shift weight to one foot.
2. Hinge forward, extending rear leg back to hip height.
3. Arms extend forward or at sides.
4. Body forms a T-shape. Hold 3–5 breaths.
